REDIGERBAR COPY til Kinky Sundae-landingpagen. Ret teksten her — layout/kode/CSP ligger i src/kinky-sundae.njk og røres ikke. Nogle felter har små HTML-tags (,
, , …) til fremhævning; lad dem stå. Titel/description redigeres i toppen af src/kinky-sundae.njk (front matter). Efter rettelse: commit → merge → live.

hero.thesis: One Sunday a month, Module closes to the world and opens for us. This is not a swingers' club. It's a room built on one principle: consent is everything.

lines: Bodies that say yes — out loud.
manifest.note: Ink & Art and Module fold their worlds into one night: electronic music, tattoo art and kink in the same room. Sex-positive, radically LGBTQ+-friendly, and built on consent from the door to daybreak. If you're here for that, you're home. If you're not, this isn't your night — and that's completely okay.

isItYou.heading: Is it you?
isItYou.forTitle: This is for you if you
forItems: come for the music, the art and the freedom as much as the desire
understand that "no" and silence mean the same thing
ask before you touch — every time, everyone
respect that some dance, some get tattooed, some have sex — and that it's all equally valid
are here to be present, not to collect anyone
isItYou.noTitle: It's not for you if you
noItems: are looking for a swingers' club or "free" sex
think a no is up for negotiation
film, photograph or "just check your phone" on the floor
see other people's bodies as something you're owed
can't be bothered to read the rest of this page

rules.heading: Safer space
rules.intro: By entering, you agree to Module's shared guidelines — everyone here is entitled to a space free from harassment, discrimination and exclusion. All genders, skin tones, sexual orientations, ages and body types are welcome. Consent, turned all the way up.

items.t: Only an enthusiastic, verbal YES is a yes.
items.d: No means no. Silence means no. Mumbling means no. Uncomfortable body language means no. Anything that isn't a clear yes is a no.

items.t: No physical contact without clear consent.
items.d: Ask, every time, everyone. There are no exceptions, no matter how far the night has come.
Racism, sexism, homophobia and transphobia will not be tolerated. Cross the line and you're out — and you stay out.
Looking is fine — respect boundaries. Give people the room to be here on their own terms.

items.t: No photos or video inside the club.
items.d: Phones away; your camera is covered at the door. It protects everyone — including you. What happens on the floor stays on the floor.

items.t: Our staff and awareness team are here for you.
items.d: Feel uncomfortable, or see a boundary crossed? Reach out immediately — they're easy to find. We'll believe you, and we'll help.

zones.d: Module's sound system, all night. Dark, hard, relentless. This is where you dance.
Ink & Art's artists in the house with flash and designs. Pick the piece to the music — we set it afterwards (see below).
Performers, and room for desire. Sex is possible almost everywhere — but nothing is required anywhere, and there's always a clothed space to step back to.

ink.big:
Ink is set at the studio.
Sober. Clean hands.
body: On the night, ink is an experience and a choice: flash on the wall, designs, placement, booking. You find the piece while the music runs.
The tattoo itself we set at Ink & Art's studio — sober, in clean hands, where it belongs. Kinky Sundae is where the piece is born. Larsbjørnsstræde is where it becomes skin.

door.heading: The door

facts.small: Sunday 10:00 → Monday 05:00. Module closes at 09 — we open at 10.
Valid photo ID at the door. No exceptions.
Latex, leather, mesh, minimal, costume. No street clothes. Changing on site.

door.note: At the door: photo ID, ticket check, dress check, a sticker over your camera, and a short briefing on the rules. Then the cloakroom — and in. Bring someone you trust.

cta.sub: Spots are few — 200 in total. Sign up with Orbit to secure your place. It's cheaper than the door, and you get the final details direct.
cta.done: You're in — welcome to Orbit. We send the final details and your member price (150 DKK) straight to your inbox, before the door.
cta.fine: A ticket doesn't guarantee entry. The door decides, and we reserve the right to refuse for breaking the dress code or house rules. Kinky Sundae is a sex-positive, radically LGBTQ+-friendly space with zero tolerance for discrimination and boundary-crossing. We work for a safe environment — that takes you doing the same. A collaboration between Module and Ink & Art Copenhagen.

foot.meta: Copenhagen · Sunday night · Consent is everything
